Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive report of all test files related to the implement command:
## Summary
I've found all test files related to the "implement" command in the erk codebase. Here are the results:
### Direct Test Files for implement.py and implement_shared.py
**Test Files in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/implement/` directory:** 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/implement/__init__.py` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/implement/conftest.py` 3. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/implement/test_execution_modes.py` 4. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/implement/test_file_mode.py` 5. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/implement/test_flags.py` 6. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/implement/test_issue_mode.py` 7. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/implement/test_model_flag.py` 8. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/implement/test_target_detection.py`
**Unit Tests:** 9. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/test_implement_shared.py` (tests for implement_shared.py)
**Related Test Files:** 10. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/admin/test_plan_implement_workflow.py` (tests the plan implementation workflow)
### Source Files Being Tested
- `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py` (main implement command) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/implement_shared.py` (shared utilities for implement)
The test suite is comprehensive and covers: - Execution modes - File mode operations - Command flags - Issue mode operations - Model flags - Target detection - Implementation workflows - Shared implementation utilities
